title: vilfa alba var. sylvatica
intro: Vilfa alba var. sylvatica, also known as mountain fescue or alpine fescue, is a variety of grass that is native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Vilfa alba var. sylvatica include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and colds. Traditionally, Vilfa alba var. sylvatica has been used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
